\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  \begin{hebrew}
  תְּפִלָּה \\
T FILAH
  \end{hebrew}%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  \begin{hebrew}
  אֲדֹנָי, שְׂפָתַי תִּפְתָּח, \\
וּפִי יַגִיד תְּהִלָּתֶךָ.
  \end{hebrew}%
}

\newcommand{\blockC}{%
  ADONAI, s'fatai tiftach, \\
ufi yagid t'hilatecha. \\
ADONAI, open up my lips, \\
that my mouth may declare Your praise.%
}
